notes: Logical two-leg XTI/XNG historical-kurtosis basket from approved card HOLLSTEIN-MAX-2021_XTI_XNG_S02. Run on XTIUSD.DWX D1; at the first tradable bar of each broker month, calculate source-defined Pearson kurtosis from the latest 252 completed simple D1 returns, buy the higher-kurtosis leg, short the lower-kurtosis leg, and evaluate the package rather than standalone legs. The directly relevant source tests are insignificant or sign-reversed, so Q02 is a strict out-of-sample falsification.
